first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning for the low score remains consistent across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the lack of mandatory Japanese language proficiency as a primary disqualifier. Other differences in the description of strengths and concerns are minor rephrasings or slight variations in technical terminology, falling well within the expected range of run-to-run noise and not constituting a substantive change in evaluation.
